tombstone-corpse-rate.actual: Tombstone store always reduced by `CREEP_CORPSE_RATE`; no body energy reclaim on `suicide()`
tombstone-corpse-rate.expected: On `suicide()`, tombstone store includes full reclaimed body energy plus carried resources

link-self-transfer.expected: Returns `ERR_INVALID_TARGET` when target is the source link itself

link-cross-owner.actual: `StructureLink.transferEnergy` allows transfer to another player's link
link-cross-owner.expected: Returns `ERR_NOT_OWNER` when target link is owned by another player

death-container-diversion.actual: Creep death does not divert resources into same-tile container
death-container-diversion.expected: Death resources flow into a live same-tile container before any tombstone remainder

extractor-cooldown-off-by-one.expected: Extractor cooldown reports full `EXTRACTOR_COOLDOWN` after harvest

factory-cooldown-no-decrement.actual: Factory cooldown reports full `COMMODITIES[resource].cooldown` on the tick after `produce()`
factory-cooldown-no-decrement.expected: Factory cooldown reports `COMMODITIES[resource].cooldown - 1` on the tick after `produce()`

link-cooldown-not-persisted.actual: `link.transferEnergy` cooldown not persisted in structure-only rooms (processor missing `context.didUpdate`)
link-cooldown-not-persisted.expected: Link cooldown persists across ticks regardless of creep presence

lab-bound-getfreecapacity-returns-zero.expected: Returns `null` for a mineral the lab cannot hold

rampart-no-protection.actual: Ramparts do not absorb damage for objects on their tile (no rampart redirect in combat/dismantle processors)
rampart-no-protection.expected: Damage targeting an object on a rampart tile is redirected to the rampart

renew-while-spawning.actual: `Spawn.renewCreep` returns `OK` while spawn is actively spawning
renew-while-spawning.expected: Returns `ERR_BUSY` while spawn is actively spawning

renew-rejects-boosted-creep.expected: Accepts boosted creeps and strips the boosts during renew

recycle-no-body-reclaim.actual: `Spawn.recycleCreep` only kills the creep (processor marked TODO); no energy deposited
recycle-no-body-reclaim.expected: Deposits `floor(bodyCost Ă— ttlRemaining / CREEP_LIFE_TIME)` energy into the tombstone via `_die` with `dropRate=1.0`

lab-cooldown-no-decrement.actual: Lab cooldown reports full `REACTION_TIME` after reaction/unboost
lab-cooldown-no-decrement.expected: Lab cooldown reports `REACTION_TIME - 1` on the tick after the action

lab-not-owner-precedence.actual: Lab action on unowned lab returns `ERR_RCL_NOT_ENOUGH`

safemode-concurrent-allowed.actual: Allows `activateSafeMode` on multiple owned controllers simultaneously
safemode-concurrent-allowed.expected: Returns `ERR_BUSY` when any owned controller already has an active safe mode

container-destroy-no-spill.actual: Container destroyed by decay does not drop its contents as ground resources
container-destroy-no-spill.expected: Container contents become dropped resources on the tile when decay destroys it

destroy-ownership-bypass.actual: `structure.destroy()` allowed when room controller not owned by player
destroy-ownership-bypass.expected: Returns `ERR_NOT_OWNER` when the room controller is missing or not owned by the player

notifyWhenAttacked-not-implemented.expected: Enforces `ERR_NOT_OWNER`/`ERR_INVALID_ARGS`, returns `OK` on success, and persists the setting next tick

eventlog-attack-missing.expected: `EVENT_ATTACK` entries appear in the event log for each combat hit

tough-boost-no-reduction.actual: Boosted TOUGH parts do not reduce incoming damage
tough-boost-no-reduction.expected: Boosted TOUGH parts reduce incoming damage by the boost's damage-multiplier

boost-energy-cost-scales.actual: Energy cost scales with boost multiplier for repair/upgrade
boost-energy-cost-scales.expected: Boosted repair/upgrade consume the same unboosted energy amount per work part

route-callback-ignored.expected: `routeCallback` return values influence route selection (Infinity blocks, numbers weight)

transfer-wrong-resource-err-full.actual: `transfer()` of a wrong resource to a structure returns `ERR_FULL` (`checkHasCapacity` runs before capacity-for-resource dispatch)
transfer-wrong-resource-err-full.expected: Returns `ERR_INVALID_TARGET` when the structure cannot hold that resource

withdraw-enemy-rampart-no-protection.actual: `withdraw()` does not enforce `ERR_NOT_OWNER` for hostile structures under a non-public enemy rampart
withdraw-enemy-rampart-no-protection.expected: Returns `ERR_NOT_OWNER` when the target sits under a non-public hostile rampart

generate-safe-mode-requires-work.expected: No body-part requirement; needs only `SAFE_MODE_COST` ghodium and range

controller-my-undefined-on-unowned.actual: `StructureController.my` returns `undefined` on an unowned/neutral controller (strict match against absent `#user` field)

safemode-ignores-downgrade-threshold.expected: Returns `ERR_TIRED` when the downgrade timer is below the safe-mode threshold

tombstone-store-missing.actual: Tombstone snapshot does not include store energy from combat kills
tombstone-store-missing.expected: Tombstone `store` includes carried resources plus body-part corpse energy

moveto-nopathfinding-returns-ok.actual: `moveTo({noPathFinding: true})` returns `OK` when no cached path exists
moveto-nopathfinding-returns-ok.expected: Returns `ERR_NOT_FOUND` when no reusable path is available

pull-spawning-no-guard.actual: `pull()` on a spawning creep returns `OK` (no spawning check in pull intent)
pull-spawning-no-guard.expected: Returns `ERR_INVALID_TARGET` when the target is a spawning creep

findpath-same-pos-not-empty.actual: `Room.findPath()` returns a 1-step path when source equals destination
findpath-same-pos-not-empty.expected: Returns an empty result (`[]` or `''` with `serialize: true`) when source and destination match

mineral-harvest-no-overflow-drop.actual: `harvest(mineral)` overflow does not create a dropped resource pile
mineral-harvest-no-overflow-drop.expected: Overflow amount drops as a resource pile on the harvester's tile

transfer-controller-no-upgrade-redirect.actual: `transfer(controller, RESOURCE_ENERGY)` returns `ERR_NOT_IN_RANGE` and does not redirect
transfer-controller-no-upgrade-redirect.expected: Redirects to `upgradeController` behavior (or equivalent successful upgrade intent)

withdraw-wrong-resource-not-enough-energ.actual: `withdraw()` with a resource the target cannot hold returns `ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_ENERGY`
withdraw-wrong-resource-not-enough-energ.expected: Returns `ERR_INVALID_TARGET` when the target cannot hold that resource

dismantle-no-destroy-at-zero-hits.actual: `dismantle()` reducing hits to `0` leaves the structure present with `hits=0`
dismantle-no-destroy-at-zero-hits.expected: Structure is destroyed in the same tick once hits reach `0`

shape-extra-hits-my.actual: Base RoomObject exposes `hits`/`hitsMax`/`my` on non-structure objects and leaks `my` onto unowned structures; wall missing `ticksToLive`; ruin missing `structureType`
shape-extra-hits-my.expected: Non-structure objects omit `hits`/`hitsMax`/`my`; unowned structures omit `my`; wall exposes `ticksToLive`; ruin exposes `structureType`

shape-struct-missing-legacy-compat.expected: Legacy compat getters are present on `link` and `storage`

shape-body-part-always-has-boost.actual: Unboosted body parts expose `boost` key (with `undefined` value)
shape-body-part-always-has-boost.expected: `boost` key is only present when the part is actually boosted

shape-game-surface-mismatch.actual: `Game` missing `cpuLimit`; `Game.flags` and `Game.powerCreeps` present but with different own-property surfaces than vanilla
shape-game-surface-mismatch.expected: `Game` exposes canonical top-level fields with matching data-property surface

shape-flag-crash.actual: Flag shape discovery crashes (`Cannot use 'in' operator on undefined`)
shape-flag-crash.expected: Flag objects expose the documented shape without crashing

spawn-duplicate-name-allowed.actual: `spawnCreep` allows a name that collides with a currently spawning creep (no check against spawning creeps in `checkSpawn`)
spawn-duplicate-name-allowed.expected: Returns `ERR_NAME_EXISTS` when the name collides with a spawning creep

rawmemory-set-no-eager-limit-check.actual: `RawMemory.set(largeString)` returns normally; the 2MB cap throws later inside `memory/memory.ts:flush()` during `runtimeConnector.send`, surfaced to the adapter as a runtime sandbox error rather than a user-code exception
rawmemory-set-no-eager-limit-check.expected: `RawMemory.set` throws synchronously at call time when the value exceeds the 2MB limit, so a user-code try/catch can observe the throw

rawmemory-set-invalidates-parsed-memhack.actual: `RawMemory.set` clears the cached parsed `Memory`, so a subsequent `Memory.x` access re-parses from the newly-set string and loses pre-set mutations
rawmemory-set-invalidates-parsed-memhack.expected: Setting `RawMemory` after `Memory` has been accessed preserves the already-parsed `Memory` object for the rest of the tick (memhack)

foreign-segment-not-supported.actual: `RawMemory.foreignSegment` is unpopulated; `setDefaultPublicSegment` is a no-op console.error; cross-user segment reads return `null`
foreign-segment-not-supported.expected: Foreign segment requests populate `RawMemory.foreignSegment` with `{ username, id, data }` on the following tick

getrawbuffer-uint8-truncation.actual: `terrain.getRawBuffer(new Uint8Array(2500))` writes a packed 32-bit value per source byte at `game/terrain.ts:77-81`, which truncates to the low byte when the destination is `Uint8Array`. Only one of every four tile masks survives; the remaining 1875 bytes stay zero.
getrawbuffer-uint8-truncation.expected: Fills the 2500-byte destination with one mask per tile so `buf[y*50 + x] === terrain.get(x, y)` for every (x, y).
